modmenu.descriptionTranslation.parabola: Physics-accurate trajectory preview for every projectile.
config.parabola.title: Parabola Settings
config.parabola.enabled.tooltip: Master toggle — enables or disables the entire mod.
config.parabola.showWorldArc.tooltip: Render the trajectory arc and impact block highlight in the world.
config.parabola.showHudPanel.tooltip: Show the mini impact-scope panel in the bottom-right corner of the screen.
